# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Security fixes are provided for the latest released version.

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| latest  | yes       |
| older   | no        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not open public issues for security vulnerabilities.

Use one of these private channels:

1. GitHub Security Advisories for this repository:
   `https://github.com/ininids/aam-cli/security/advisories/new`
2. Email the maintainer at `security@ininids.in.rs`.

Include:

- A clear description of the issue and impact.
- Reproduction steps or proof-of-concept.
- Affected version and environment.
- Any suggested mitigation.

## Response Targets

- Initial acknowledgement: within 72 hours.
- Status update: within 7 days.
- Fix timeline: depends on severity and complexity.

## Disclosure Process

After a fix is available, we coordinate disclosure and publish release notes.
